devdoc.author: edsphinx
devdoc.details: Each deployed adapter is preconfigured with a specific DIA key and registered with the provided aggregator.

params.adapter: Address of the newly deployed adapter
params.key: DIA key identifier used for price lookup (e.g. "ETH/USD")

params._aggregator: Address of the aggregator contract that implements `addOracle`
params._diaOracle: Address of the DIA oracle contract

deployAdapter(address,address,string).details: Only callable by the contract owner. Registers the adapter in the aggregator automatically.

params.base: Address of the base token (e.g. ETH)
params.quote: Address of the quote token (e.g. USDC)

returns._0: adapter Address of the newly deployed DIAOracleAdapter

devdoc.title: DIAAdapterFactory

AdapterCreated(address,address,address,s.notice: Emitted when a new DIAOracleAdapter is deployed and registered

aggregator().notice: Address of the oracle aggregator that supports `addOracle`

constructor.notice: Deploys the factory and binds it to a DIA oracle and an oracle aggregator

deployAdapter(address,address,string).notice: Deploys a new DIAOracleAdapter for a specific base/quote pair and key, and registers it

dia().notice: Address of the DIA oracle contract (IDIAOracleV2)

owner().notice: Owner address with permission to deploy adapters

userdoc.notice: Factory contract to deploy DIAOracleAdapter instances and register them with an oracle aggregator.
